festival lindy hop

Taranto Swing Festival

11 –14
JUNE 2026

Taranto, Italy · Europe

Official website
About the festival

BENVENUTI IN PUGLIA! The Taranto Swing Festival is more than just a dance event: it's a true swing experience. An international cast of outstanding dancers, musicians, and performers comes together in a unique seaside location, surrounded by the sea, beaches, and Mediterranean vibes. Here, world-class classes, live music, social dancing, sunsets by the sea, and shared moments blend into a warm, welcoming, and family-like atmosphere. Dance, relax, connect, and live swing not only on the dance floor, but throughout the entire day. This is where music, movement, and holiday feelings become one unforgettable experience. …Taranto Swing Festival, That's Amore!

Style lindy hop
Date June 11–14, 2026
Venue Taranto, Italy
